title: send_payment step numbering skips step 7 — docs say 9 steps, comment labels jump 6→8
description: payment.rs send_payment has a 9-step docstring (steps 1-9) and inline comments. The comment before broadcast says '// Step 8: Broadcast.' — step 7 (described in the doc as 'Build the signed transaction') appears without a step comment label in the inline code (step 6 comment exists, then step 8 appears next). The missing '// Step 7:' comment causes the reader to think there are only 8 steps, or that there is a step-numbering error. This is confusing to a contributor auditing the function against the docs. What would make it clear: add '// Step 7: Build the signed transaction.' comment before build_shielded_tx call, aligning with the docstring.
close_reason: Fixed: updated doc comment (removed stale step 3 'Load params', renumbered 4-9 to 3-8) and updated inline step labels to match (Step 8→7 for broadcast, Step 9→8 for best-effort).
